title: GSR No. 894(E) dated 07.09.2001- Amendment in the notification number 140 (E) dated 17.02.2000
description: GSR No. 894(E) dated 07.09.2001- Amendment in the notification number 140 (E) dated 17.02.2000
text: REGD. NO. D L.-33004/99 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 669] NEW DELHI, TUESDAY, SEPTEMBER 5, 2001/BHADRA 27, 1923 2890 GI/2001 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 _ _ THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—Suc.3(ii)] MINISTRY OF SOCIAL JUSTICE AND EMPOWERMENT NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 7th September, 2001 S.0.894(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by section 15 of the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals Act, 1960 (59 of 1960), the Central Government, on the advice of the Board, hereby makes the following further amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowermeri number, S.O. 140(E) dated 17-2-2000, munch/:— • ' • ^ - In the said notification, for serial number 18 and the entries relating thereto, the-i following serial number and entries shall be substituted, namely;— • * "18 Padma Shri Professor Ranjit Roy Choudhary, —Member" President Delhi Medical Council, National Institute of Immunology, NewDeIhi-110067. Residence: Y-85,HauzKhas, NewDelhi-n00]6. [F.NO.25/1/2000-AWD] SWAPNA RAY, Jt. Secy. Note : The following notifications were issued earlier in relation to the Committee for the Purpose of Control and Supervision of Experiments on Animals, namely :— 1.
